evals.name: bug-report-with-error-output
evals.prompt: aria 的 state-scanner 在我项目上跑到一半报错了：'Cannot read property phases of undefined'，然后直接退出。我的 .aria/config.json 配置文件是有的，macOS 系统。帮我把这个 bug 报给 Aria 维护团队。
expectations: Should classify as Bug Report and use structured template with reproduction steps and expected/actual behavior
Should collect environment information (plugin version, skills count, OS, config status)
Should show complete issue content for user confirmation before submission
Should route to correct repository (Forgejo 10CG/Aria or GitHub 10CG/aria-plugin)

evals.name: feature-request-english
evals.prompt: I think Aria should support YAML config files in addition to JSON. The .aria/config.json works but YAML would be more readable for complex configurations with inline comments. Please submit this as a feature request to the Aria maintainers.
expectations: Should classify as Feature Request with enhancement label, not bug report
Should capture the user's use case (YAML readability, comment support) in the issue body
Should use structured template with use case and proposed solution sections
Should present composed issue for user privacy review before submission
